feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Accelerator Hub
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Accelerator Hub Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SBPA: Finding Machine Information through Business Accelerator Hub API
entry.content:
Hi SBPA Team,

I'm currently building an monitoring script which is leveraging the Business Accelerator Hub API (Overview | Workflow | SAP Business Accelerator Hub) and I am having trouble finding some info:

1. How do I find what machine an automation is run on via API? I see it's a populated field in the UI/UX. I've attached an image below.

Thanks,

Sahil Malhotra

entry.title: How to upload or get profile picture employee master from service layer?
entry.content: How to get profile picture from /EmployeesInfo?

entry.title: How to set the Technical Object while calling the POST method of Maintenance related APIs?
entry.content:
I was testing out the Create Maintenance Order API today, but it seems like no matter what type of request I send (POST/ PATCH) it never considers the Technical Object No. in the Request Body's Payload.

But I can send rest of the details with no issue. After that the Order gets created into my S4 System, but the Technical Object is NOT linked to it. In order to link it, I must use the UI and manually edit this new Order and then assign the same Technical Object No. that I was trying to send from the API.

I observed the same issue while using the Maintenance Notification APIs as well.

Could you please let me know what is happening here?

Pls see screenshots below for more clarity:

entry.title: Where can I find the One Domain Model Explorer?
entry.content:
Hello,

I tried looking on api.sap.com for the explorer but it is no longer there. Furthermore, I bookmarked the explorer and it says page not found.

Has the explorer moved somewhere else?

Kind regards,

David

entry.title: Testing SAP SuccessFactors APIs: OData API Application Export permission is not enabled
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to test the APIs for SAP SuccessFactors on the API Business Accelerator Hub. If I test APIs in the Sandbox environment for S/4HANA (e.g. SAP Business Accelerator Hub), everything works fine. For SAP SuccessFactors I get a response:

[COE0020]OData API Application Export permission in Admin Center is not enabled

E.g. go to Try Out | Job Application | SAP Business Accelerator Hub -> click on Run for https://sandbox.api.sap.com/successfactors/odata/v2/JobApplicationAssessmentReport?$top=20

and you get the response 

{<br>  "error": {<br>    "code": "COE_GENERAL_FORBIDDEN",<br>    "message": {<br>      "lang": "en-US",<br>      "value": "[COE0020]OData API Application Export permission in Admin Center is not enabled"<br>    }<br>  }<br>}

Can you please enable the Export permission in the sandbox' Admin Center so that I can try out these APIs (see 2575936 - Error '[COE00020] Recruiting OData API Job Offer Export permission in Admin Center is not enabled'. (sap.com))?

Thanks,

Holger.

entry.title: #SCPI : get SRT_UTIL trace logs in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an inbound scenario where we are suing SOAP adapter in sap cpi (Type: standard synchronous SOAP API webservice). We have noticed that even if the message is successful in SAP CPI, message is getting failed in SAP S4HANA due to some data related Erros. But we can see those data related Erros only when we enable the trace in SRT_UTIL. It is not SAP's best practice to enable the trace always.

So, what is the alterative? How can a functional consultant get to know the data error without enabling the trace?
or is there any way to send back this data to sap cpi?

entry.title: #SCPI : ODATA response error in SAP CPI "Order 10001XX is already being processed by S4RFCUSER"
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a sender SFTP adapter to receiver ODATA (S4HANA-onprem) scenario. CPI is picking multiple files due to 4 worker nodes and its sending to S4HANA via ODATA adapter. But we are getting below error in SAP CPI as a ODATA response:

Order 1000*** is already being processed by S4RFCUSER.
We are assuming this is happing due to parallel processing of all the files together to S4HANA system?


How to resolve this issue?
Can we make a EOIO QOS in SAP CPI ? or is there any way to pick or send single-single file to S4HANA system ?
Kindly help.

entry.title: SAP BTP APIM Build Checklist
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP BTP APIM and need to prepare APIM build review checklist document for project delivery, can you please share me some inputs to what should I consider in the APIM build checklist

Thanks,Venn

entry.title: Replicate postman script in ABAP
entry.content:
Hello All,

I've a question regarding the sample scrips that were created for postman to perform operations on the sac users to remove roles etc.

is any one aware, if we can achieve the same in ABAP?

I've used api in the abap, but replicating the script written for postman in abap is something I'm wondering on how to do it!!

Any pointers please.

https://blogs.sap.com/2021/05/28/sap-analytics-cloud-scim-api-best-practices-and-sample-scripts/

Thanks in advance,

Naga

entry.title: Correct use of Odata $top and $skiptoken for large datasets
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm fetching a large number of products from the API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product service and have ran into som issues with $skiptoken, $top and the __next url parameter. Before I create a ticket to SAP I'd like to verify that my suspicion is correct.

Dataset count: 16609

1. Running query with $top=16609 returns 5000 entities with __next = "$top=11609&$skiptoken=5000"

Question: When skiptoken is added, shouldn't $top be unchanged at 16609?

2. Running query by using next property = $top=11609&$skiptoken=5000, returns 5000 entities with next = &$top=6609&$skiptoken=10000"

3. Running query by using next property = &$top=6609&$skiptoken=10000", returns 0 entities and a 500 assertion failed error. (top 10k from 6609 entries..)

It seems to be that the next url property doesn't work as intended because the $top parameter is reduced by each call.

entry.title: SAP BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL already fully invoice
entry.content:
Hi All,

Let's say we query from BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL, update completed PO with fully invoice to non-sap.

However, after a few months, user update the PO with credit memo, then how I can know which PO Number currently updated for this credit memo?

Summarize my explanation:

1. user set fully invoiced PO No for 11121

2. Technical use BAPI_PO_GETDETAIL for PO no 11121 and save that to non-sap

3. then suddenly user change that PO 11121 (credit memo) <-- From here how i can trace this po no from BAPI ?

thank you

entry.title: Error while testing an API in CF Integration suite
entry.content:
Error is below with response 200

"Since your browser does not support JavaScript, you must press the Continue button "

Does any faced a similar issue

entry.title: Consume SAP API in non-SAP applications..
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have our own JS based portal bespoke solution (non-SAP) developed by us having HR related functionality. Is it possible to consume SAP APIs (listed in SAP Business API hub)? Or do we need services like CPI or BTP based middleware?

Without that if it is possible then what are the ways to do it? Any help available?

Regards,

Pd

entry.title: API for SAP R/3 ECC 6 with EHP 8 ?
entry.content:
Hey Guys,

l am looking for an API for creating quotations on SAP R/3 ECC 6 with EHP 8.

Can you lead me ?

BR

entry.title: How to query the labels of Gender field in Personal Information by Odata API
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are facing an issue of querying the labels of Gender field in Personal Information by Odata API.

The value returned was only "M"/"F", but we need the value of labels based on user's language, such as "Male"/"Female" if the user's language is English_US.

According to the following KBA, we have recognized that Gender is a hard-coded picklist and Gender field in Personal Information need to be defined as a STRING field, which means we can't get the labels through navigation.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2249519

If you have any information please share.

entry.title: How can I put empty in Request parameter in Business accelerator
entry.content:
Hi Community

I am testing Odata connection now. I am trying out below

- Material Stock - Read

- Get Method

- /A_MatlStkInAcctMod

in this request, Batch/Supplier/Customer/SD documents and... are required to fill in. But Stocks in my S4HC has no info related to these info. very simple stock.

in this case what values I can put in Parameter field?

Best Regards,

Daichi

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FICA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards..

Ganga

entry.title: Labels of BAS in SAP BTP COCKPIT
entry.content:
Hi All,
In my BTP cockpit i subscribed to business application studio (BAS) and added the labels to it. Now, is there any possibilty to get the labels of this subscription through any SAP provided API's or services .

If anybody have any idea. Please share. It's Urgent.

Regards,
Shivasuprith

entry.title: Integration SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition - Outbound Delivery is not reflected in SAP CI
entry.content:
Hi team,

Our customer needs an integration between SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition and SAP CI (Cloud Integration). The requirement is that every time an Outbound Delivery is created or modified, the data is replicated to CI.

We have investigated the corresponding API in SAP Business Accelerator Hub and found the following:

Outbound Delivery - Notify (B2B): https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_DELIVERY_REQUEST_OUT/overview

The scope item that our customer has active is the following: 3NR (Sales Scheduling Agreements)

The User and Communication System were created, in the same way the Communication Arrangement has been created based on the communication scenario SAP_COM_0444.


Outbound Delivery 80000025 is created:

Outbound message is monitored through the Fiori Message Dashboard application: No outbound Outbound Delivery messages created are seen

(Namespace = /LEEDI; Recipient Name = EDI_DELOUT_RECIPIENT)

The Endpoint is monitored in CPI and the messages are not seen either:

Do we need any additional configuration?

Is the API we are using the correct one?

Thanks for your help.

Regards.

J. Camilo

entry.title: Can not find Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0339 in system
entry.content:
Hello expert,

We can not find Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0339 when creating communication arrangement.

Overview | Change Record History | SAP Business Accelerator Hub
